canvas-white.$description: Canvas White — Page background, card surface, text on dark tiles

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, card and image borders, grid hairlines, nav accents

carbon-plum.$description: Carbon Plum — Heading text — a warm near-black that softens against pure Ink Black for editorial moments

ash.$description: Ash — Subtle divider and muted border tone for low-emphasis separations

diatype.$description: Body and small UI text at 19px; copyright/caption at 9px. Diatype is a contemporary neo-grotesque with humanist proportions — paired with the bold Variable cut, it creates a tight, modern-editorial feel without a serif in sight. The 9px caption is intentionally tiny, like a museum wall label.

diatype-variable.$description: Primary navigation and section headings at 26px. The 500 weight is the default nav voice; 700 is reserved for emphasis and the designer's name. The 26px cap-height next to 19px body text creates a deliberate 7px gap that reads as confident hierarchy without loud type.

times.$description: Occasional fallback or inherited editorial copy; not a primary voice. Appears at 13px as a quiet secondary tier.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page background beneath the entire grid

tile-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Flat project-image tiles with no container styling
